title: XMAS IC ELECTRONIC ELF BAG OF FARTS
features: Barrels of laughs are to be had with these bags of farts! Simply give them a squeeze and chuckle along with those naughty elves
A brilliant gift for all ages! They make a great present for Christmas and are a good size for stocking fillers, secret Santa, or party bags.
There festive red bags measure 9 x 13cm.
description: Barrels of laughs are to be had with these bags of farts! Simply give them a squeeze and chuckle along with those naughty elves. A brilliant gift for all ages! They make a great present for Christmas and are a good size for stocking fillers, secret Santa, or party bags. There festive red bags measure 9 x 13cm. Required Batteries: 3x LR44 batteries (included) Suitable for ages 3+
